mnemonics.title: Minimax Principle
mnemonics.content: MAX aims to Maximize the Minimum gain - Remember 'Maxi-Min' for the maximizing player's perspective

mnemonics.title: Alpha-Beta Pruning
mnemonics.content: Alpha Cuts Beta - When Alpha is greater than or equal to Beta, branches can be cut (pruned)

mnemonics.title: Game Types
mnemonics.content: PIPD - Perfect Information, Deterministic (like Chess) vs IISC - Imperfect Information, Stochastic, Chance (like Poker)
